tasks.title: Add getFileIdsForObjects to FileMapper
tasks.description: Add getFileIdsForObjects(array $uuids): array<string, int[]> to lib/Db/FileMapper.php. Single SQL query for the entire input set; UUIDs without files come back with empty arrays.

tasks.title: Unit test getFileIdsForObjects
tasks.description: Cover with a unit test: empty input, single UUID with files, many UUIDs with mixed counts, no-files cases.

tasks.title: composer check:strict clean for FileMapper changes
tasks.description: Run composer check:strict (PHPCS, PHPMD, Psalm, PHPStan); zero new warnings. Fix any pre-existing issues in touched files.

tasks.title: Add _files normalization mapping
tasks.description: Edit lib/Service/Object/RenderObject.php normalizeMap (~line 1015): add '_files' => '@self.files'.

tasks.title: Gate renderFiles() call site
tasks.description: Edit RenderObject.php line 908: gate $this->renderFiles($entity) on normalized _extend containing @self.files. The body of renderFiles() is NOT modified.

tasks.title: Attach lightweight default IDs in renderEntity
tasks.description: When extend does NOT cover @self.files, attach lightweight IDs via FileMapper::getFileIdsForObjects([$entity->getUuid()]) and $entity->setFiles(...).

tasks.title: Audit internal getFiles() readers
tasks.description: Verify renderFileProperties and any other internal readers of $entity->getFiles() are unaffected by the lightweight integer values; route through extend or fix the read site if needed.

tasks.title: Batch-fetch file IDs for list results
tasks.description: In ObjectService::searchObjectsPaginated (and SOLR/IndexService path), call FileMapper::getFileIdsForObjects($uuids) once per request and attach per-UUID ID arrays to each row's @self.files. Single query regardless of page size.

tasks.title: Route list rows through renderFiles when extend covers @self.files
tasks.description: When _extend[]=@self.files (or _files) is requested on a list, route each result row through renderEntity/renderFiles for full metadata. Comment the discouraged-perf intent inline.

tasks.title: Empty-array default for rows with no files
tasks.description: Ensure rows with no files emit @self.files: [] (empty array, never absent or null).

tasks.title: Unit: extend variants produce correct shapes
tasks.description: renderEntity without extend → integers; with _extend[]=@self.files → full objects; with _extend[]=_files → identical to _extend[]=@self.files.

tasks.title: Unit: zero-files object emits empty array
tasks.description: Object with zero files → @self.files: [] in both default and extend modes.

tasks.title: Unit: renderFiles() not invoked without extend
tasks.description: Assert via mock/spy that renderFiles() is NOT called when extend does not cover @self.files.

tasks.title: Integration: list without extend uses single batched query
tasks.description: List endpoint without extend → integer-array @self.files on every row + single getFileIdsForObjects query observed.

tasks.title: Integration: list with extend produces full metadata
tasks.description: List endpoint with _extend[]=@self.files → full file metadata on every row + per-row file lookups observed (correctness, not perf).

tasks.title: Integration: opencatalogi inherits the contract
tasks.description: Opencatalogi PublicationsController::show and ::index reflect the new contract without code changes on the opencatalogi side.

tasks.title: Search consumers for full-shape file reads
tasks.description: Search opencatalogi, softwarecatalog, and other in-tree consumers for direct reads of @self.files[i].downloadUrl/.path/.title etc. Document any breaks.

tasks.title: Document or open follow-ups for breaks
tasks.description: For each break identified: note the client-side migration in release notes, or open a follow-up issue against the consumer repo.

tasks.title: Frontend audit inside openregister
tasks.description: Search openregister Vue components for reads of full-file shape; either request extend explicitly or read from lightweight ID list.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG breaking-change entry
tasks.description: Add CHANGELOG entry under Breaking Changes: @self.files is now opt-in. Default emits file IDs only. Add _extend[]=@self.files (or _extend[]=_files) for full metadata.

tasks.title: Update OpenRegister API documentation
tasks.description: Lightweight IDs by default; full metadata via _extend; both spellings supported and equivalent; show/list symmetry.

tasks.title: API perf warning for list+extend
tasks.description: Add visible warning: list+extend on @self.files is heavily discouraged because of computational cost.

tasks.title: Verify ADR-002 needs no amendment
tasks.description: Verify ADR-002 (REST API conventions) needs no amendment — _extend predates this change.

tasks.title: Update opencatalogi show endpoint docs
tasks.description: Update public API docs for GET /publications/{catalogSlug}/{id} — describe the BREAKING default change (file IDs) and the opt-in syntax (both spellings).

tasks.title: Update opencatalogi list endpoint docs
tasks.description: Update public API docs for GET /publications/{catalogSlug} — describe the new @self.files field on list rows (lightweight by default, opt-in for full).

tasks.title: Add perf warning to opencatalogi list docs
tasks.description: Add the perf warning verbatim to opencatalogi list-endpoint docs.

tasks.title: Recommend attachments() endpoint for bulk metadata
tasks.description: Confirm PublicationsController::attachments() documentation explicitly notes it as the recommended path for bulk attachment metadata across many publications.

tasks.title: composer check:strict end-to-end clean
tasks.description: Run composer check:strict end-to-end — confirm clean.

tasks.title: Smoke: opencatalogi show with/without extend
tasks.description: curl opencatalogi show endpoint with and without _extend[]=@self.files against a publication with attachments. Confirm shapes match the spec.

tasks.title: Smoke: opencatalogi list with/without extend
tasks.description: curl opencatalogi list endpoint with and without _extend[]=@self.files. Confirm shapes match the spec.

tasks.title: Smoke: _files vs @self.files identical
tasks.description: Confirm _extend[]=_files is byte-identical to _extend[]=@self.files on the same request.

tasks.title: Run /opsx:verify
tasks.description: Run /opsx:verify opt-in-files-extend to confirm artifacts and code agree.
